// ─── Studio Info ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  phone: "+91 96007 26602",
  email: "admin@ayyanstudio.in",
  location: "Chennai, Tamil Nadu",
  instagram: "@ayyanstudio",
  established: "Est. 2014",

// ─── Categories ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// ─── Marquee Labels ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const MARQUEE_ITEMS = [
  "Metanity Shoot",
  "Newborn Shoot",
  "Toddler Shoot",
  "Baby Shower",
  "Naming Ceremony",
  "Birthday Event",
  "Engagement Event",
  "Wedding Event",
  "New House Warming",
  "Ear Piercing Event",
  "Corporate Event",
  "Private Theatre Surprise"
];

// ─── Services ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const SERVICES = [
  {
    icon: "💍",
    title: "Wedding Photography",
    desc: "Full-day coverage of your sacred union — from mehendi and sangeet to the final vidai. Traditional & candid both.",
    price: "From ₹45,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "🎂",
    title: "Birthday & Milestones",
    desc: "First birthdays, sweet sixteens, 50th milestones — every age deserves a beautiful frame.",
    price: "From ₹12,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "💛",
    title: "Anniversary Celebrations",
    desc: "Silver, golden, or any year in between — celebrate the years with portraits as timeless as your love.",
    price: "From ₹15,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "💫",
    title: "Engagement Sessions",
    desc: "Candid pre-wedding and ring ceremony shoots that capture the joy of your new beginning.",
    price: "From ₹18,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "👶",
    title: "Naming & Baby Ceremonies",
    desc: "Naamkaran, cradle ceremonies, and baby portraits — tiny moments, lifelong memories.",
    price: "From ₹8,000",
  },
  {
    icon: "👨‍👩‍👧",
    title: "Family Portraits",
    desc: "Studio and outdoor family sessions — perfect for festivals, reunions, and yearly traditions.",
    price: "From ₹6,000",
  },
];

// ─── Testimonials ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const TESTIMONIALS = [
  {
    name: "Priya Aravind",
    event: "Wedding — Feb 2024",
    text: "Ayyan Studio captured every ritual so beautifully. Our families still talk about the photos. Truly the best in Chennai!",
    rating: 5,
  },
  {
    name: "Lakshmi & Venkat",
    event: "25th Anniversary — Mar 2024",
    text: "We felt like newlyweds again during the shoot. The team made us so comfortable. Every photo is a treasure.",
    rating: 5,
  },
  {
    name: "Dr. Rajan",
    event: "50th Birthday — Jun 2024",
    text: "Professional, creative, and so warm. The candid shots at my birthday were priceless. Highly recommended!",
    rating: 5,

];

// ─── View Route Definitions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const VIEWS = [
  { key: "services", label: "Services", path: "/services" },
  { key: "contact",  label: "Contact",  path: "/contact"  },
];
